message.content:
## 작업 목표
"C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_gn7\can pe 자료\" 폴더의 자료들을 읽고, RPSU(시트 ECU)에서 사용하는 CAN 신호들과 통풍(벤트/블로워) 관련 신호만 추출하여 정리 문서를 작성해야 합니다.

## 참조 자료 폴더
경로: C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_gn7\can pe 자료\

파일 목록:
- 20250522_STD_DB_CAR_R2.0_2024_FD_SAU_DRV_Local_v25.05.01 (1).dbc
- 20250905_STD_DB_CAR_R2.0_2024_FD_B2_25.08.01.dbc
- GN7 PE_시트 작동검사기_제작참고서_R2.0_250917(보안해제).pptx
- Microsoft_Excel_Worksheet.xlsx
- Microsoft_PowerPoint_Presentation.pptx
- Microsoft_Word_Document.docx
- Microsoft_Word_Document1.docx
- Microsoft_Word_Document2.docx
- Microsoft_Word_Document3.docx
- [SHVU2_0]LDF(TYPE2)_v1_00_GN7 PE차종_PROTO_1차_241017.ldf
- oleObject4_embedded.xlsx

## 할 일
1. 모든 파일을 읽어서 내용을 파악합니다.
   - DBC 파일은 텍스트로 읽을 수 있음 (CAN 데이터베이스)
   - LDF 파일도 텍스트로 읽을 수 있음 (LIN 데이터베이스)
   - Excel, Word, PPT는 doc-reader로 읽기
   
2. 특히 다음 CAN ID와 관련된 신호를 집중적으로 찾아야 합니다:
   - 0x49B: 통풍/벤트 관련 (CCU 관련, CAN FD 32byte) — **이게 가장 중요** — 블로워가 5초만 돌고 멈추는 문제가 있어서 정확한 바이트맵, 카운터/CRC 유무 확인 필수
   - 0x731/0x739: RPSU UDS 요청/응답 (진단)
   - 0x3D1: BDC_FD_02 IGN 신호
   - 0x3DB: BDC_FD_12 레스트모드 신호
   - 0x7DF: DTC 클리어 (기능주소)
   - RPSU에서 수신하는 모든 CAN 메시지
   - RPSU에서 송신하는 모든 CAN 메시지
   - 통풍/블로워 제어에 관련된 모든 신호

3. DBC 파일에서 특히 확인할 것:
   - 0x49B 메시지의 시그널 정의 (바이트 위치, 비트 길이, 값 범위, 카운터/CRC 시그널 유무)
   - RPSU 노드가 수신(RX)하는 메시지 목록
   - RPSU 노드가 송신(TX)하는 메시지 목록

4. 결과를 아래 경로에 마크다운 파일로 작성합니다:
   **C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_gn7\NoiseTestPwrFrame(ICE)\ICE_CAN_신호_레퍼런스.md**

5. 문서 구성:
   - 원본 자료 출처 표기
   - RPSU 관련 CAN 메시지 (ID, 이름, DLC, 주기, TX/RX 방향)
   - 각 메시지별 시그널 상세 (바이트 위치, 비트 길이, 값 설명)
   - 통풍/블로워 관련 신호 상세 (0x49B 중심)
   - 카운터/CRC가 있다면 계산 방식
   - 현재 코드에서 사용중인 값과 DBC 사양 비교

6. 그리고 CLAUDE.md에 이 문서를 참조하라는 내용을 추가합니다:
   **C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_gn7\NoiseTestPwrFrame(ICE)\CLAUDE.md** 파일 맨 위에 아래 내용 추가:
   ```
   ## CAN PE 신호 레퍼런스
   - ICE(PE) CAN 신호 정리: [ICE_CAN_신호_레퍼런스.md](ICE_CAN_신호_레퍼런스.md)
   - 원본 자료: `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_gn7\can pe 자료\` (DBC, PPT, Word, Excel)
   ```

한글로 작성. 코드 주석도 한글.

content.text: 먼저 모든 파일을 확인하겠습니다. DBC, LDF 파일은 텍스트로 직접 읽고, Office 파일은 적절한 방법으로 읽겠습니다.

content.text: DBC 파일이 크므로 먼저 RPSU, 0x49B, 통풍/벤트 관련 키워드로 검색하겠습니다. LDF 파일은 작으므로 전체를 읽겠습니다.
이제 DBC 파일에서 RPSU, 0x49B, 통풍/벤트/블로워 관련 내용을 검색하겠습니다.

content.text: RRPSU(후석 우측 PSU)가 보입니다. 이제 0x49B(1179 decimal)를 검색하겠습니다. 또한 SAU DBC에서 노드 목록과 0x49B를 찾겠습니다.

    71→            st = PCANBasic.InitializeFD(_handle, fdBitrate)
    72→        Else
    73→            st = PCANBasic.Initialize(_handle, TPCANBaudrate.PCAN_BAUD_500K, TPCANType.PCAN_TYPE_ISA, 0, 0)
    74→        End If
    75→
    76→        RaiseEvent Log("PCAN Init: " & st.ToString())
    77→        Return st
    78→    End Function

   103→    Private Sub Dispose(ByVal disposing As Boolean)

   105→

   107→

   109→            StopPolling()

   140→    ' ===== 수신 폴링 =====
   141→    Public Sub StartPolling(ByVal idleSleepMs As Integer)
   142→        StopPolling()
   143→        _pollCts = New CancellationTokenSource()
   144→        Dim token = _pollCts.Token
   145→
   146→        If _isFd Then
   147→            ' FD 모드 폴링
   148→            ThreadPool.QueueUserWorkItem(Sub()
   149→                                             Dim msg As TPCANMsgFD
   150→                                             Dim ts As ULong
   151→                                             While Not token.IsCancellationRequested
   152→                                                 Dim st = PCANBasic.ReadFD(_handle, msg, ts)
   153→                                                 If st <> TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_QRCVEMPTY Then
   154→                                                     If LogAllRawRxFrames Then
   155→                                                         RaiseEvent Log(BuildLogLineFD("RX", msg, ts))
   156→                                                     End If
   157→                                                     Dim len = DlctoLen(msg.DLC)
   158→                                                     Dim data As Byte() = New Byte(len - 1) {}
   159→                                                     If len > 0 Then Array.Copy(msg.DATA, data, len)
   160→                                                     ProcessCanMsg(msg.ID, data)
   161→                                                 ElseIf st = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_QRCVEMPTY Then
   162→                                                     If idleSleepMs > 0 Then Thread.Sleep(idleSleepMs)
   163→                                                 Else
   164→                                                     RaiseEvent [Error](st)
   165→                                                     Thread.Sleep(10)
   166→                                                 End If
   167→                                             End While
   168→                                         End Sub)
   169→        Else
   170→            ' 표준 CAN 2.0 폴링
   171→            ThreadPool.QueueUserWorkItem(Sub()
   172→                                             Dim msg As TPCANMsg
   173→                                             Dim ts As TPCANTimestamp
   174→                                             While Not token.IsCancellationRequested
   175→                                                 Dim st = PCANBasic.Read(_handle, msg, ts)
   176→                                                 If st = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK Then
   177→                                                     If LogAllRawRxFrames Then
   178→                                                         RaiseEvent Log(BuildLogLineStd("RX", msg))
   179→                                                     End If
   180→                                                     Dim len As Integer = msg.LEN
   181→                                                     Dim data As Byte() = New Byte(len - 1) {}
   182→                                                     If len > 0 Then Array.Copy(msg.DATA, data, len)
   183→                                                     ProcessCanMsg(msg.ID, data)
   184→                                                 ElseIf st = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_QRCVEMPTY Then
   185→                                                     If idleSleepMs > 0 Then Thread.Sleep(idleSleepMs)
   186→                                                 Else
   187→                                                     RaiseEvent [Error](st)
   188→                                                     Thread.Sleep(10)
   189→                                                 End If
   190→                                             End While
   191→                                         End Sub)
   192→        End If
   193→
   194→        RaiseEvent Log("Polling started.")
   195→    End Sub
   196→
   197→    Public Sub StartPolling()
   198→        StartPolling(2)
   199→    End Sub

   201→    Public Sub StopPolling()
   202→        If _pollCts IsNot Nothing Then
   203→            Try
   204→                _pollCts.Cancel()
   205→            Catch
   206→            End Try
   207→            _pollCts.Dispose()
   208→            _pollCts = Nothing
   209→            RaiseEvent Log("Polling stopped.")
   210→        End If
   211→    End Sub

   222→    Public Function WriteStd(ByVal id As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte()) As TPCANStatus
   223→        Dim msg As New TPCANMsg With {
   224→            .ID = id,
   225→            .LEN = CByte(If(data IsNot Nothing, Math.Min(data.Length, 8), 0)),
   226→            .MSGTYPE = TPCANMessageType.PCAN_MESSAGE_STANDARD,
   227→            .DATA = New Byte(7) {}
   228→        }
   229→        If data IsNot Nothing Then Array.Copy(data, msg.DATA, Math.Min(data.Length, 8))
   230→        Dim st = PCANBasic.Write(_handle, msg)
   231→        If st <> TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK Then
   232→            RaiseEvent [Error](st)
   233→        Else
   234→            If LogAllRawTxFrames Then RaiseEvent Log(BuildLogLineStd("TX", msg))
   235→        End If
   236→        Return st
   237→    End Function

   239→    ' ===== FD 송신 =====
   240→    Public Function WriteFD(ByVal id As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte(), ByVal brs As Boolean, ByVal isExtended As Boolean) As TPCANStatus
   241→        Dim msg As New TPCANMsgFD With {
   242→            .ID = id,
   243→            .DLC = CByte(LengthToDlc(If(data IsNot Nothing, data.Length, 0))),
   244→            .MSGTYPE = TPCANMessageType.PCAN_MESSAGE_FD Or
   245→                       If(brs, TPCANMessageType.PCAN_MESSAGE_BRS, 0) Or
   246→                       If(isExtended, TPCANMessageType.PCAN_MESSAGE_EXTENDED, 0),
   247→            .DATA = New Byte(63) {}
   248→        }
   249→        If data IsNot Nothing Then Array.Copy(data, msg.DATA, data.Length)
   250→
   251→        Dim st = PCANBasic.WriteFD(_handle, msg)
   252→        If st <> TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK Then
   253→            RaiseEvent [Error](st)
   254→        Else
   255→            If LogAllRawTxFrames Then
   256→                RaiseEvent Log(BuildLogLineFD("TX", msg, 0))
   257→            End If
   258→        End If
   259→        Return st
   260→    End Function

   277→    Public Sub AddJob(ByVal name As String, ByVal id As UInteger, ByVal periodMs As Integer, ByVal ParamArray data As Byte())
   278→        SyncLock _jobs
   279→            Dim i As Integer
   280→            For i = _jobs.Count - 1 To 0 Step -1
   281→                If _jobs(i).Name = name Then _jobs.RemoveAt(i)
   282→            Next
   283→            _jobs.Add(New TxJob(name, id, periodMs, data, True, False, False))
   284→        End SyncLock
   285→
   286→        If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log(String.Format("Job added: {0}, ID=0x{1:X3}, Period={2}ms", name, id, periodMs))
   287→        StartScheduler()
   288→    End Sub

   304→        If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log(String.Format("Job (32B) added: {0}, ID=0x{1:X3}, Period={2}ms", name, id, periodMs))
   305→        StartScheduler()

   331→    Private Function HexToBytes(ByVal hex As String) As Byte()
   332→        If hex Is Nothing Then Return Nothing
   333→
   334→        Dim cleaned As String = hex.Replace(" ", "") _
   335→                                   .Replace(vbTab, "") _
   336→                                   .Replace(vbCr, "") _
   337→                                   .Replace(vbLf, "")
   338→
   339→        If cleaned.Length = 0 Then
   340→            Return New Byte() {}
   341→        End If
   342→
   343→        If (cleaned.Length Mod 2) <> 0 Then
   344→            Throw New ArgumentException("hexData length must be even.", "hex")
   345→        End If
   346→
   347→        Dim len As Integer = cleaned.Length \ 2
   348→        Dim data(len - 1) As Byte
   349→
   350→        Dim i As Integer
   351→        For i = 0 To len - 1
   352→            data(i) = Byte.Parse(cleaned.Substring(i * 2, 2), NumberStyles.HexNumber)
   353→        Next
   354→
   355→        Return data
   356→    End Function

   370→    Private Sub StartScheduler()
   371→        If _sched IsNot Nothing Then Return
   372→        _sw = New Stopwatch()
   373→        _sw.Start()
   374→        _sched = New System.Timers.Timer(10.0)
   375→        _sched.AutoReset = True
   376→        AddHandler _sched.Elapsed, AddressOf Sched_Elapsed
   377→        _sched.Start()
   378→        RaiseEvent Log("Scheduler started.")
   379→    End Sub
   380→
   381→    Private Sub StopScheduler()
   382→        If _sched IsNot Nothing Then
   383→            _sched.Stop()
   384→            RemoveHandler _sched.Elapsed, AddressOf Sched_Elapsed
   385→            _sched.Dispose()
   386→            _sched = Nothing
   387→            RaiseEvent Log("Scheduler stopped.")
   388→        End If
   389→    End Sub
   390→
   391→    Private Sub Sched_Elapsed(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As ElapsedEventArgs)
   392→        Dim ms As Long = If(_sw IsNot Nothing, _sw.ElapsedMilliseconds, Environment.TickCount)
   393→
   394→        ' ISO-TP 타임아웃 처리
   395→        IsoTpPump(ms)
   396→
   397→        Dim snapshot As List(Of TxJob)
   398→        SyncLock _jobs
   399→            snapshot = New List(Of TxJob)(_jobs)
   400→        End SyncLock
   401→
   402→        Dim i As Integer
   403→        For i = 0 To snapshot.Count - 1
   404→            Dim job As TxJob = snapshot(i)
   405→
   406→            If job.PeriodMs = 0 OrElse ms - job.LastTick >= job.PeriodMs Then
   407→
   408→                ' ===== Alive Counter 적용 =====
   409→                If job.AliveIndex >= 0 AndAlso job.Data IsNot Nothing AndAlso job.AliveIndex < job.Data.Length Then
   410→                    Dim b As Byte = job.Data(job.AliveIndex)
   411→
   412→                    If job.AliveHighNibble Then
   413→                        b = CByte(((job.AliveValue And &HF) << 4) Or (b And &HF))
   414→                    Else
   415→                        b = CByte((b And &HF0) Or (job.AliveValue And &HF))
   416→                    End If
   417→
   418→                    job.Data(job.AliveIndex) = b
   419→                    job.AliveValue = CByte((job.AliveValue + 1) And &HF)
   420→                End If
   421→                ' ===== Alive 끝 =====
   422→
   423→                ' ===== AUTOSAR E2E P02 CRC 갱신 =====
   424→                If job.E2eEnabled AndAlso job.Data IsNot Nothing AndAlso job.Data.Length >= 2 Then
   425→                    Dim cntIndex As Integer = If(job.AliveIndex >= 0, job.AliveIndex, 1)
   426→
   427→                    If cntIndex >= 0 AndAlso cntIndex < job.Data.Length Then
   428→                        Dim cnt As Integer = job.Data(cntIndex) And &HF
   429→                        Dim dataId As Byte = job.E2eDataIdList(cnt And &HF)
   430→
   431→                        Dim crc As Byte = Crc8H2F_Calc(job.Data, 1, job.Data.Length - 1, dataId)
   432→                        job.Data(0) = crc
   433→                    End If
   434→                End If
   435→                ' ===== E2E CRC 끝 =====
   436→
   437→                ' FD/Standard 분기
   438→                If _isFd Then
   439→                    WriteFD(job.Id, job.Data, job.Brs, job.IsExt)
   440→                Else
   441→                    WriteStd(job.Id, job.Data)
   442→                End If
   443→                job.LastTick = ms
   444→
   445→                If job.OneShot Then
   446→                    RemoveJob(job.Name)
   447→                Else
   448→                    SyncLock _jobs
   449→                        Dim j As Integer
   450→                        For j = 0 To _jobs.Count - 1
   451→                            If _jobs(j).Name = job.Name Then
   452→                                Dim t As TxJob = _jobs(j)
   453→                                t.LastTick = job.LastTick
   454→                                t.AliveValue = job.AliveValue
   455→                                _jobs(j) = t
   456→                                Exit For
   457→                            End If
   458→                        Next
   459→                    End SyncLock
   460→                End If
   461→            End If
   462→        Next
   463→    End Sub
   464→
   465→    ' ===== UDS/ISO-TP (8-byte 배열 기반) =====
   466→    Private Sub OnCanRx_Uds(ByVal canId As UInteger, ByVal dlc8 As Byte())
   467→        If dlc8 Is Nothing OrElse dlc8.Length < 2 Then Return
   468→
   469→        Dim pciType As Integer = (dlc8(0) >> 4) And &HF
   470→        Select Case pciType
   471→            Case &H0 ' SF
   472→                Dim len As Integer = dlc8(0) And &HF
   473→                If len <= 0 OrElse len > 7 Then Return
   474→                Dim uds As Byte() = New Byte(len - 1) {}
   475→                Buffer.BlockCopy(dlc8, 1, uds, 0, len)
   476→                OnUdsComplete(canId, uds)
   477→
   478→            Case &H1 ' FF
   479→                Dim totalLen As Integer = ((dlc8(0) And &HF) << 8) Or dlc8(1)
   480→                Dim part = dlc8.Skip(2).ToArray()
   481→
   482→                _isotp.Active = True
   483→                _isotp.RespId = canId
   484→                _isotp.ReqId = canId - &H8
   485→                _isotp.Expected = totalLen
   486→                _isotp.Got = part.Length
   487→                _isotp.NextSn = 1
   488→                _isotp.Buf = If(_isotp.Buf, New List(Of Byte)())
   489→                _isotp.Buf.Clear()
   490→                _isotp.Buf.AddRange(part.Take(Math.Min(part.Length, totalLen)))
   491→                _isotp.LastActivityMs = If(_sw IsNot Nothing, _sw.ElapsedMilliseconds, Environment.TickCount)
   492→
   493→                SendFlowControlCts(_isotp.ReqId)
   494→
   495→            Case &H2 ' CF
   496→                If Not _isotp.Active OrElse canId <> _isotp.RespId Then Return
   497→
   498→                Dim sn As Byte = CByte(dlc8(0) And &HF)
   499→                If sn <> _isotp.NextSn Then
   500→                    If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[ISO-TP] SN mismatch exp=" & _isotp.NextSn & ", got=" & sn & " → abort")
   501→                    _isotp.Active = False
   502→                    Exit Select
   503→                End If
   504→                _isotp.NextSn = CByte((_isotp.NextSn Mod &HF) + 1)
   505→
   506→                Dim chunk = dlc8.Skip(1).ToArray()
   507→                Dim remain As Integer = _isotp.Expected - _isotp.Got
   508→                Dim take As Integer = Math.Min(remain, chunk.Length)
   509→                _isotp.Buf.AddRange(chunk.Take(take))
   510→                _isotp.Got += take
   511→                _isotp.LastActivityMs = If(_sw IsNot Nothing, _sw.ElapsedMilliseconds, Environment.TickCount)
   512→
   513→                If _isotp.Got >= _isotp.Expected Then
   514→                    Dim uds = _isotp.Buf.Take(_isotp.Expected).ToArray()
   515→                    _isotp.Active = False
   516→                    OnUdsComplete(canId, uds)
   517→                End If
   518→
   519→            Case &H3 ' FC
   520→            Case Else
   521→        End Select
   522→    End Sub
   523→
   524→    Private Sub SendFlowControlCts(ByVal reqId As UInteger)
   525→        WriteCanMsg(ToIdHex(reqId), {"30", "00", "00", "00", "00", "00", "00", "00"})
   526→        RaiseEvent Log("[ISO-TP] FC(CTS) sent to " & ToIdHex(reqId))
   527→    End Sub
   528→
   529→    Private Sub IsoTpPump(ByVal nowMs As Long)
   530→        If _isotp.Active AndAlso (nowMs - _isotp.LastActivityMs) > _isotp.TimeoutMs Then
   531→            If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[ISO-TP] Timeout → abort")
   532→            _isotp.Active = False
   533→        End If
   534→    End Sub
   535→
   536→    Private Sub OnUdsComplete(ByVal respId As UInteger, ByVal uds As Byte())
   537→        RaiseEvent UdsCompleted(respId, uds)
   538→
   539→        If ShouldFilterUds(uds) Then
   540→            Return
   541→        End If
   542→
   543→        If LogVerboseInternalState Then
   544→            If uds.Length >= 3 AndAlso uds(0) = &H62 Then
   545→                Dim did As String = "F1" & uds(2).ToString("X2")
   546→                Dim payload = uds.Skip(3).ToArray()
   547→                Dim ascii As Boolean = payload.All(Function(b) b >= &H20 AndAlso b <= &H7E)
   548→                Dim val As String = If(ascii, Encoding.ASCII.GetString(payload), String.Join(" ", payload.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))
   549→                RaiseEvent Log("[RDBI] DID " & did & " = " & val)
   550→            ElseIf uds.Length >= 3 AndAlso uds(0) = &H7F Then
   551→                RaiseEvent Log("[NRC] SID=0x" & uds(1).ToString("X2") & ", NRC=0x" & uds(2).ToString("X2"))
   552→            Else
   553→                RaiseEvent Log("[UDS] " & String.Join(" ", uds.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))
   554→            End If
   555→        End If
   556→    End Sub
   557→
   558→    Private Shared Function ToIdHex(ByVal id As UInteger) As String
   559→        Return "0x" & id.ToString("X3")
   560→    End Function
   561→
   562→    Private Shared Function ShouldFilterUds(ByVal uds As Byte()) As Boolean
   563→        If uds Is Nothing OrElse uds.Length = 0 Then Return False
   564→        If uds(0) = &H7E Then Return True
   565→        Return False
   566→    End Function
   567→
   568→    ' ===== 간단 UDS SF 추출 =====
   569→    Private Shared Function TryExtractUdsPayload(ByVal dlc8 As Byte(), ByRef uds As Byte()) As Boolean
   570→        uds = Nothing
   571→        If dlc8 Is Nothing OrElse dlc8.Length < 2 Then Return False
   572→
   573→        Dim pciType As Integer = (dlc8(0) >> 4) And &HF
   574→        If pciType = &H0 Then
   575→            Dim len As Integer = dlc8(0) And &HF
   576→            If len <= 0 OrElse len > dlc8.Length - 1 Then Return False
   577→            uds = New Byte(len - 1) {}
   578→            Buffer.BlockCopy(dlc8, 1, uds, 0, len)
   579→            Return True
   580→        End If
   581→        Return False
   582→    End Function
   583→
   584→    Private Sub LogRDBIResponseFromCan(ByVal canData As Byte())
   585→        Dim uds As Byte() = Nothing
   586→        If Not TryExtractUdsPayload(canData, uds) Then Return
   587→        If uds.Length < 3 OrElse uds(0) <> &H62 Then Return
   588→
   589→        Dim did As String = "F1" & uds(2).ToString("X2")
   590→        Dim payload = uds.Skip(3).ToArray()
   591→        Dim ascii As Boolean = payload.All(Function(b) b >= &H20 AndAlso b <= &H7E)
   592→        Dim val As String = If(ascii, Encoding.ASCII.GetString(payload), String.Join(" ", payload.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))
   593→        If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[RDBI] DID " & did & " = " & val)
   594→    End Sub
   595→
   596→    ' ===== 3C3 LimitSet FSM =====
   597→    Private Shared ReadOnly StaMap As String() = {"0", "1", "2", "3", "4", "5", "6", "7"}
   598→
   599→    Private Shared Function IsBusy(ByVal code As UInteger) As Boolean
   600→        Return Not (code = 0 OrElse code = 4)
   601→    End Function
   602→
   603→    Private Class LimitSetSession
   604→        Public Axis As String
   605→        Public Active As Boolean
   606→        Public LastCode As UInteger
   607→        Public StartedAt As DateTime
   608→        Public LastChangeAt As DateTime
   609→        Public Toggles As Integer
   610→        Public FramesSinceStable As Integer
   611→    End Class
   612→
   613→    Private _tiltSess As New LimitSetSession With {.Axis = "Tilt"}
   614→    Private _hgtSess As New LimitSetSession With {.Axis = "Height"}
   615→
   616→    Private Sub Handle_3C3_LimitSetFSM(ByVal d As Byte())
   617→        Dim tiltSta As UInteger = ReadMotorola(d, 132, 3)
   618→        Dim hgtSta As UInteger = ReadMotorola(d, 138, 3)
   619→
   620→        UpdateLimitSet(_tiltSess, tiltSta)
   621→        UpdateLimitSet(_hgtSess, hgtSta)
   622→    End Sub
   623→
   624→    Private Sub UpdateLimitSet(ByVal s As LimitSetSession, ByVal code As UInteger)
   625→        If Not s.Active Then
   626→            If IsBusy(code) Then
   627→                s.Active = True
   628→                s.StartedAt = DateTime.Now
   629→                s.LastChangeAt = s.StartedAt
   630→                s.Toggles = 0
   631→                s.FramesSinceStable = 0
   632→                If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[" & s.Axis & "] Limit Set START (code=" & code & ", map=" & MapSta(code) & ")")
   633→            End If
   634→        Else
   635→            If code <> s.LastCode Then
   636→                s.LastChangeAt = DateTime.Now
   637→                If IsBusy(s.LastCode) <> IsBusy(code) Then s.Toggles += 1
   638→                If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[" & s.Axis & "] State CHG " & s.LastCode & "→" & code & " (map " & MapSta(s.LastCode) & "→" & MapSta(code) & ")")
   639→            End If
   640→
   641→            If Not IsBusy(code) Then
   642→                s.FramesSinceStable += 1
   643→                If s.FramesSinceStable >= 2 Then
   644→                    Dim dur = DateTime.Now - s.StartedAt
   645→                    If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[" & s.Axis & "] Limit Set DONE in " & dur.TotalSeconds.ToString("0.0") &
   646→                                                                  "s (toggles=" & s.Toggles & ", last=" & code & "/" & MapSta(code) & ")")
   647→                    s.Active = False
   648→                End If
   649→            Else
   650→                s.FramesSinceStable = 0
   651→            End If
   652→
   653→            Dim elapsed = DateTime.Now - s.StartedAt
   654→            If elapsed.TotalSeconds > 20 AndAlso s.Active Then
   655→                If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[" & s.Axis & "] Limit Set TIMEOUT (>20s) — last=" & code & "/" & MapSta(code))
   656→                s.Active = False
   657→            End If
   658→        End If
   659→        s.LastCode = code
   660→    End Sub
   661→
   662→    Private Shared Function ReadMotorola(ByVal d As Byte(), ByVal startBit As Integer, ByVal len As Integer) As UInteger
   663→        Dim v As UInteger = 0
   664→        If d Is Nothing Then Return 0
   665→        Dim i As Integer
   666→        For i = 0 To len - 1
   667→            Dim cur As Integer = startBit - i
   668→            Dim bi As Integer = cur \ 8
   669→            Dim biIn As Integer = 7 - (cur Mod 8)
   670→            If bi >= 0 AndAlso bi < d.Length Then
   671→                v = (v << 1) Or CUInt((d(bi) >> biIn) And 1)
   672→            End If
   673→        Next
   674→        Return v
   675→    End Function
   676→
   677→    Private Shared Function ReadSignalMotorola(ByVal data As Byte(), ByVal startBit As Integer, ByVal length As Integer) As UInteger
   678→        Dim value As UInteger = 0
   679→        Dim i As Integer
   680→        For i = 0 To length - 1
   681→            Dim curBit As Integer = startBit - i
   682→            Dim byteIndex As Integer = curBit \ 8
   683→            Dim bitIndexInByte As Integer = 7 - (curBit Mod 8)
   684→            If byteIndex < 0 OrElse byteIndex >= data.Length Then Continue For
   685→            Dim bit As Integer = (data(byteIndex) >> bitIndexInByte) And &H1
   686→            value = (value << 1) Or CUInt(bit)
   687→        Next
   688→        Return value
   689→    End Function
   690→
   691→    Private Shared Function MapSta(ByVal v As UInteger) As String
   692→        Return If(v < CUInt(StaMap.Length), StaMap(v), "UNK(" & v & ")")
   693→    End Function
   694→
   695→    Private Sub AppendIfChanged(ByVal tag As String, ByVal curr As UInteger, ByRef last As UInteger?)
   696→        If Not last.HasValue OrElse last.Value <> curr Then
   697→            RaiseEvent Log(tag & " = " & curr)
   698→            last = curr
   699→        End If
   700→    End Sub
   701→
   702→    ' 상태 변수들(초기화만 유지)
   703→    Private _hrestExtMv, _rlMonMv, _rrMonMv, _rlFtMv, _rrFtMv As UInteger?
   704→    Private _rclInit, _slideInit, _tiltInit, _relaxTiltInit, _heightInit, _cushExtInit, _legrestInit, _hrestInit, _hrestExtInit, _rlMonInit, _rrMonInit, _rlFtInit, _rrFtInit As UInteger?
   705→    Private _rclVrtlSet, _slideVrtlSet, _tiltVrtlSet, _rlxTiltVrtlSet, _heightVrtlSet, _cushExtVrtlSet, _legrestVrtlSet, _hrestVrtlSet, _hrestExtVSert, _rlMonVrtlSet, _rrMonVrtlSet As UInteger?
   706→
   707→    ' ===== FD 기반 ISO-TP (Raw FD 프레임) =====
   708→    Private Sub HandleIsoTp_Core(ByVal frame As TPCANMsgFD)
   709→        If frame.DATA Is Nothing OrElse frame.DATA.Length = 0 Then Return
   710→        Dim pci As Byte = frame.DATA(0)
   711→
   712→        If (pci And &HF0) = &H0 Then ' SF
   713→            Dim len As Integer = (pci And &HF)
   714→            If len < 0 Then len = 0
   715→            If len > 7 Then len = 7
   716→            Dim payload As Byte() = New Byte(len - 1) {}
   717→            Array.Copy(frame.DATA, 1, payload, 0, len)
   718→            RaiseEvent UdsCompleted(frame.ID, payload)
   719→            If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("UDS SF RX LEN=" & len)
   720→            _isotp = New IsoTpState()
   721→        ElseIf (pci And &HF0) = &H10 Then ' FF
   722→            Dim total As Integer = ((pci And &HF) << 8) Or frame.DATA(1)
   723→            _isotp.Active = True
   724→            _isotp.RespId = frame.ID
   725→            _isotp.ReqId = frame.ID - &H8
   726→            _isotp.Expected = total
   727→            _isotp.Buf = If(_isotp.Buf, New List(Of Byte)(total))
   728→            _isotp.Buf.Clear()
   729→
   730→            Dim copyLen As Integer = Math.Min(6, frame.DATA.Length - 2)
   731→            If copyLen > 0 Then _isotp.Buf.AddRange(frame.DATA.Skip(2).Take(copyLen))
   732→            _isotp.Got = copyLen
   733→            _isotp.NextSn = 1
   734→            _isotp.LastActivityMs = If(_sw IsNot Nothing, _sw.ElapsedMilliseconds, Environment.TickCount)
   735→
   736→            If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("UDS FF RX total=" & total & ", first=" & copyLen)
   737→            SendFlowControlCts(_isotp.ReqId)
   738→        ElseIf (pci And &HF0) = &H20 Then ' CF
   739→            If Not _isotp.Active OrElse frame.ID <> _isotp.RespId Then Return
   740→
   741→            Dim sn As Byte = CByte(pci And &HF)
   742→            If sn <> _isotp.NextSn Then
   743→                If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("UDS CF SN mismatch " & sn & "!=" & _isotp.NextSn)
   744→                _isotp.Active = False
   745→                Return
   746→            End If
   747→            _isotp.NextSn = CByte((_isotp.NextSn + 1) And &HF)
   748→
   749→            Dim take As Integer = Math.Min(7, frame.DATA.Length - 1)
   750→            If take > 0 Then _isotp.Buf.AddRange(frame.DATA.Skip(1).Take(take))
   751→            _isotp.Got += take
   752→            _isotp.LastActivityMs = If(_sw IsNot Nothing, _sw.ElapsedMilliseconds, Environment.TickCount)
   753→
   754→            If _isotp.Got >= _isotp.Expected Then
   755→                Dim pl = _isotp.Buf.Take(_isotp.Expected).ToArray()
   756→                RaiseEvent UdsCompleted(frame.ID, pl)
   757→                If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("UDS CF RX done len=" & pl.Length)
   758→                _isotp = New IsoTpState()
   759→            End If
   760→        ElseIf (pci And &HF0) = &H30 Then
   761→            If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("UDS FC RX")
   762→        End If
   763→    End Sub
   764→
   765→    ' ===== 헬퍼 =====
   766→    Private Shared Function LengthToDlc(ByVal len As Integer) As Integer
   767→        If len <= 0 Then Return 0
   768→        If len <= 8 Then Return len
   769→        If len <= 12 Then Return 9
   770→        If len <= 16 Then Return 10
   771→        If len <= 20 Then Return 11
   772→        If len <= 24 Then Return 12
   773→        If len <= 32 Then Return 13
   774→        If len <= 48 Then Return 14
   775→        Return 15
   776→    End Function
   777→
   778→    Private Shared Function DlctoLen(ByVal dlc As Integer) As Integer
   779→        If dlc <= 8 Then Return dlc
   780→        Select Case dlc
   781→            Case 9 : Return 12
   782→            Case 10 : Return 16
   783→            Case 11 : Return 20
   784→            Case 12 : Return 24
   785→            Case 13 : Return 32
   786→            Case 14 : Return 48
   787→            Case Else : Return 64
   788→        End Select
   789→    End Function
   790→
   791→    Private Shared Function BuildLogLineStd(ByVal dir As String, ByVal msg As TPCANMsg) As String
   792→        Dim sb As New StringBuilder()
   793→        sb.Append("["c).Append(DateTime.Now.ToString("HH:mm:ss")).Append("] ")
   794→        sb.Append(dir).Append(" ID=0x").Append(msg.ID.ToString("X3"))
   795→        sb.Append(" LEN=").Append(msg.LEN)
   796→        sb.Append(" DATA=").Append(BytesToHex(msg.DATA, msg.LEN))
   797→        Return sb.ToString()
   798→    End Function
   799→
   800→    Private Shared Function BuildLogLineFD(ByVal dir As String, ByVal msg As TPCANMsgFD, ByVal ts As ULong) As String
   801→        Dim sb As New StringBuilder()
   802→        sb.Append("["c).Append(DateTime.Now.ToString("HH:mm:ss")).Append("] ")
   803→        sb.Append(dir).Append(" ID=0x").Append(msg.ID.ToString("X"))
   804→        sb.Append(" DLC=").Append(msg.DLC)
   805→        If (msg.MSGTYPE And TPCANMessageType.PCAN_MESSAGE_EXTENDED) <> 0 Then sb.Append(" EXT")
   806→        If (msg.MSGTYPE And TPCANMessageType.PCAN_MESSAGE_BRS) <> 0 Then sb.Append(" BRS")
   807→        sb.Append(" DATA=").Append(BytesToHex(msg.DATA, DlctoLen(msg.DLC)))
   808→        If ts <> 0 Then sb.Append(" TS=").Append(ts)
   809→        Return sb.ToString()
   810→    End Function
   811→
   812→    Public Shared Function BytesToHex(ByVal data As Byte(), ByVal len As Integer) As String
   813→        If data Is Nothing OrElse len <= 0 Then Return ""
   814→        Dim n As Integer = Math.Min(len, data.Length)
   815→        Dim sb As New StringBuilder(n * 3)
   816→        Dim i As Integer
   817→        For i = 0 To n - 1
   818→            If i > 0 Then sb.Append(" ")
   819→            sb.Append(data(i).ToString("X2"))
   820→        Next
   821→        Return sb.ToString()
   822→    End Function
   823→
   824→    Private Shared Function ParseIdHex(ByVal idHex As String) As UInteger
   825→        If String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(idHex) Then Return 0
   826→        idHex = idHex.Trim()
   827→        If idHex.StartsWith("0x", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) Then
   828→            idHex = idHex.Substring(2)
   829→        End If
   830→        Dim v As UInteger = 0
   831→        UInteger.TryParse(idHex, NumberStyles.HexNumber, Nothing, v)
   832→        Return v
   833→    End Function
   834→
   835→    Private Shared Function HexArray(ByVal hex As String()) As Byte()
   836→        If hex Is Nothing Then Return New Byte(-1) {}
   837→        Dim list As New List(Of Byte)(hex.Length)
   838→        Dim i As Integer
   839→        For i = 0 To hex.Length - 1
   840→            Dim b As Byte = 0
   841→            Byte.TryParse(hex(i), NumberStyles.HexNumber, Nothing, b)
   842→            list.Add(b)
   843→        Next
   844→        Return list.ToArray()
   845→    End Function
   846→
   847→    ' ===== AUTOSAR E2E Profile 2 CRC8H2F =====
   848→    Private Shared Function Crc8H2F_Update(ByVal crc As Byte, ByVal dataByte As Byte) As Byte
   849→        Dim cur As Integer = crc Xor dataByte
   850→        Dim i As Integer
   851→        For i = 0 To 7
   852→            If (cur And &H80) <> 0 Then
   853→                cur = ((cur << 1) And &HFF) Xor &H2F
   854→            Else
   855→                cur = (cur << 1) And &HFF
   856→            End If
   857→        Next
   858→        Return CByte(cur And &HFF)
   859→    End Function
   860→
   861→    Private Shared Function Crc8H2F_Calc(ByVal data As Byte(),
   862→                                         ByVal offset As Integer,
   863→                                         ByVal count As Integer,
   864→                                         ByVal dataId As Byte) As Byte
   865→        Dim crc As Byte = &HFF
   866→
   867→        If data Is Nothing OrElse count <= 0 Then
   868→            Return 0
   869→        End If
   870→
   871→        Dim i As Integer
   872→        For i = 0 To count - 1
   873→            crc = Crc8H2F_Update(crc, data(offset + i))
   874→        Next
   875→
   876→        crc = Crc8H2F_Update(crc, dataId)
   877→        crc = CByte(crc Xor &HFF)
   878→        Return crc
   879→    End Function
   880→
   881→    ' ===== 내부 타입 =====
   882→    Private Structure TxJob
   883→        Public Name As String
   884→        Public Id As UInteger
   885→        Public PeriodMs As Integer
   886→        Public Data As Byte()
   887→        Public LastTick As Long
   888→        Public Brs As Boolean
   889→        Public OneShot As Boolean
   890→        Public IsExt As Boolean
   891→
   892→        ' Alive
   893→        Public AliveIndex As Integer
   894→        Public AliveHighNibble As Boolean
   895→        Public AliveValue As Byte
   896→
   897→        ' AUTOSAR E2E
   898→        Public E2eDataIdList As Byte()
   899→        Public E2eEnabled As Boolean
   900→
   901→        Public Sub New(ByVal name As String,
   902→                       ByVal id As UInteger,
   903→                       ByVal periodMs As Integer,
   904→                       ByVal data As Byte(),
   905→                       ByVal brs As Boolean,
   906→                       ByVal oneShot As Boolean,
   907→                       ByVal isExt As Boolean,
   908→                       Optional ByVal aliveIndex As Integer = -1,
   909→                       Optional ByVal aliveHighNibble As Boolean = False,
   910→                       Optional ByVal e2eDataIdList As Byte() = Nothing)
   911→
   912→            Me.Name = name
   913→            Me.Id = id
   914→            Me.PeriodMs = periodMs
   915→            Me.Data = data
   916→            Me.Brs = brs
   917→            Me.OneShot = oneShot
   918→            Me.IsExt = isExt
   919→
   920→            Me.LastTick = 0
   921→
   922→            Me.AliveIndex = aliveIndex
   923→            Me.AliveHighNibble = aliveHighNibble
   924→            Me.AliveValue = 0
   925→
   926→            Me.E2eDataIdList = e2eDataIdList
   927→            Me.E2eEnabled = (e2eDataIdList IsNot Nothing AndAlso e2eDataIdList.Length >= 16)
   928→        End Sub
   929→    End Structure
   930→
   931→    Private Structure IsoTpState
   932→        Public Active As Boolean
   933→        Public ReqId As UInteger
   934→        Public RespId As UInteger
   935→        Public Expected As Integer
   936→        Public Got As Integer
   937→        Public NextSn As Byte
   938→        Public Buf As List(Of Byte)
   939→        Public LastActivityMs As Long
   940→        Public TimeoutMs As Integer
   941→    End Structure
   942→
   943→    Public Event FrameDecoded As Action(Of UInteger, Byte())
   944→
   945→    Private Sub ProcessCanMsg(ByVal canId As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte())
   946→        Select Case canId
   947→            Case &H3C3
   948→                'Handle_3C3_LimitSetFSM(data)
   949→            Case &H3C4
   950→                ' 기타 파싱
   951→            Case &H739  ' PSU_RR 응답
   952→                OnCanRx_Uds(canId, data)
   953→            ' NORMAL 모드 UDS 응답 ID
   954→            Case &H70F  ' RRCCS 응답
   955→                OnCanRx_Uds(canId, data)
   956→            Case &H71A  ' RLCCS 응답
   957→                OnCanRx_Uds(canId, data)
   958→            ' PE 모드 ECU 응답 ID (DTC 클리어 등)
   959→            Case &H7AB  ' PSU_Drv 응답
   960→                OnCanRx_Uds(canId, data)
   961→            Case &H79F  ' PSU_Ast 응답
   962→                OnCanRx_Uds(canId, data)
   963→            Case &H759  ' DPSS 응답
   964→                OnCanRx_Uds(canId, data)
   965→            Case &H5EE  ' APSS 응답
   966→                OnCanRx_Uds(canId, data)
   967→            Case &H5CE  ' RLPSS 응답
   968→                OnCanRx_Uds(canId, data)
   969→            Case &H5CF  ' RRPSS 응답
   970→                OnCanRx_Uds(canId, data)
   971→            Case &H77B  ' RARS 응답
   972→                OnCanRx_Uds(canId, data)
   973→            Case Else
   974→        End Select
   975→        RaiseEvent FrameDecoded(canId, data)
   976→    End Sub
   977→
   978→End Class

1→Imports System.Linq
     2→Imports Peak.Can.Basic
     3→
     4→''' <summary>
     5→''' CAN FD (PE/ICE) 전용 테스트 폼
     6→''' - 모터/벤트: UDS IOControl + 0x49B FD 32byte
     7→''' - UDS 진단: Session, TP, SW/HW Ver, IGN ON, Limit Set/Check/Clear
     8→''' - 레스트 모드: 0x3DB FD 32byte (PSeat AutoPlayCmd)
     9→''' - DTC 클리어: ECU별 개별 + Functional(ALL)
    10→''' </summary>
    11→Public Class FrmCanIce
    12→
    13→    Private _can As CanBusService
    14→    Private _isConnected As Boolean
    15→
    16→    ' ===== 폼 이벤트 =====
    17→
    18→    Private Sub FrmCanIce_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load
    19→        Me.Text = "CAN 테스트 - [PE]"
    20→        _savedVolt = Module1.TargetVolt
    21→        UpdateVoltToggleButton()
    22→        tmrSupply.Start()
    23→        SetButtonsEnabled(False)
    24→    End Sub
    25→
    26→    Private Sub FrmCanIce_FormClosing(sender As Object, e As Windows.Forms.FormClosingEventArgs) Handles MyBase.FormClosing
    27→        tmrSupply.Stop()
    28→        DoCanClose()
    29→    End Sub
    30→
    31→    ' ===== 버튼 활성화 =====
    32→
    33→    Private Sub SetButtonsEnabled(ByVal enabled As Boolean)
    34→        grpMotor.Enabled = enabled
    35→        grpVent.Enabled = enabled
    36→        grpUds.Enabled = enabled
    37→        grpRest.Enabled = enabled
    38→        grpDtc.Enabled = enabled
    39→        btnCanOpen.Enabled = Not enabled
    40→        btnCanClose.Enabled = enabled
    41→    End Sub
    42→
    43→    ' ===== 로그 =====
    44→
    45→    Private Sub AppendLog(ByVal msg As String)
    46→        If txtLog.InvokeRequired Then
    47→            txtLog.BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() AppendLog(msg)))
    48→            Return
    49→        End If
    50→        If txtLog.TextLength > 50000 Then
    51→            txtLog.Text = txtLog.Text.Substring(txtLog.TextLength - 30000)
    52→        End If
    53→        txtLog.AppendText(msg & vbCrLf)
    54→    End Sub
    55→
    56→    Private Sub AppendResult(ByVal msg As String)
    57→        If txtResult.InvokeRequired Then
    58→            txtResult.BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() AppendResult(msg)))
    59→            Return
    60→        End If
    61→        If txtResult.TextLength > 10000 Then
    62→            txtResult.Text = txtResult.Text.Substring(txtResult.TextLength - 5000)
    63→        End If
    64→        txtResult.AppendText(msg & vbCrLf)
    65→    End Sub
    66→
    67→    Private Sub UpdateStatus(ByVal msg As String)
    68→        If StatusStrip1.InvokeRequired Then
    69→            StatusStrip1.BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() UpdateStatus(msg)))
    70→            Return
    71→        End If
    72→        lblStatus.Text = msg
    73→    End Sub
    74→
    75→    ' ===== CAN Open / Close =====
    76→
    77→    Private Sub btnCanOpen_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnCanOpen.Click
    78→        Try
    79→            _can = New CanBusService(PCANBasic.PCAN_USBBUS1, True) ' 항상 CAN FD
    80→
    81→            AddHandler _can.Log, Sub(s) AppendLog(s)
    82→            AddHandler _can.Error, Sub(errSt) AppendLog("[오류] " & errSt.ToString())
    83→            AddHandler _can.UdsCompleted, AddressOf OnUdsCompleted
    84→            AddHandler _can.FrameDecoded, AddressOf OnFrameDecoded
    85→
    86→            _can.LogAllRawTxFrames = False
    87→            _can.LogAllRawRxFrames = False
    88→
    89→            Dim st As TPCANStatus = _can.Init() ' CAN FD 기본 bitrate
    90→
    91→            If st <> TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK Then
    92→                AppendLog("CAN 초기화 실패: " & st.ToString())
    93→                _can.Dispose()
    94→                _can = Nothing
    95→                Return
    96→            End If
    97→
    98→            _can.StartPolling()
    99→            _isConnected = True
   100→            SetButtonsEnabled(True)
   101→            UpdateStatus("연결됨 [PE - CAN FD]")
   102→            AppendLog("=== CAN PE 연결 완료 ===")
   103→
   104→        Catch ex As Exception
   105→            AppendLog("[예외] " & ex.Message)
   106→        End Try
   107→    End Sub
   108→
   109→    Private Sub btnCanClose_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnCanClose.Click
   110→        DoCanClose()
   111→    End Sub
   112→
   113→    Private Sub DoCanClose()
   114→        If _can IsNot Nothing Then
   115→            Try
   116→                _can.Dispose()
   117→            Catch
   118→            End Try
   119→            _can = Nothing
   120→        End If
   121→        _isConnected = False
   122→        SetButtonsEnabled(False)
   123→        UpdateStatus("연결 해제")
   124→        AppendLog("=== CAN 연결 해제 ===")
   125→    End Sub
   126→
   127→    ' ===== UDS 응답 처리 =====
   128→
   129→    Private Sub OnUdsCompleted(ByVal respId As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte())
   130→        If data Is Nothing OrElse data.Length = 0 Then Return
   131→
   132→        Dim hex As String = String.Join(" ", data.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2")))
   133→        Dim ecuName As String = GetEcuName(respId)
   134→
   135→        If data(0) = &H62 AndAlso data.Length >= 4 Then
   136→            ' RDBI 긍정 응답
   137→            Dim did As String = data(1).ToString("X2") & data(2).ToString("X2")
   138→            Dim payload = data.Skip(3).ToArray()
   139→            Dim ascii As Boolean = payload.All(Function(b) b >= &H20 AndAlso b <= &H7E)
   140→            Dim val As String = If(ascii, System.Text.Encoding.ASCII.GetString(payload),
   141→                                  String.Join(" ", payload.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))
   142→            AppendResult("[RDBI] " & ecuName & " DID=" & did & " → " & val)
   143→
   144→        ElseIf data(0) = &H71 AndAlso data.Length >= 4 Then
   145→            ' Routine Control 긍정 응답 — 리미트/학습 결과 상세 파싱
   146→            Dim routineId As String = data(2).ToString("X2") & data(3).ToString("X2")
   147→            Dim subFunc As Byte = data(1) ' 01=Start, 03=RequestResults
   148→
   149→            If routineId = "12A6" OrElse routineId = "12A7" Then
   150→                Dim side As String = If(routineId = "12A6", "LH", "RH")
   151→                If subFunc = &H1 Then
   152→                    ' Start 응답 (EDU 세팅 또는 학습체크 요청)
   153→                    AppendResult($"[Routine] {ecuName} {side} 리미트 Start 수락 (RoutineID={routineId})")
   154→                ElseIf subFunc = &H3 AndAlso data.Length >= 5 Then
   155→                    ' RequestResults 응답 (학습 결과)
   156→                    Dim result As String = If(data(4) = &H2, "OK (학습완료)", If(data(4) = &H1, "NG (미학습)", $"결과=0x{data(4):X2}"))
   157→                    AppendResult($"★ [{side} 학습체크] {ecuName} → {result}")
   158→                Else
   159→                    AppendResult($"[Routine] {ecuName} {side} → {hex}")
   160→                End If
   161→            ElseIf routineId = "FF00" Then
   162→                ' 리미트 클리어 응답
   163→                AppendResult($"★ [리미트 클리어] {ecuName} → OK (RoutineID=FF00)")
   164→            Else
   165→                AppendResult("[Routine] " & ecuName & " RoutineID=" & routineId & " → " & hex)
   166→            End If
   167→
   168→        ElseIf data(0) = &H6F AndAlso data.Length >= 3 Then
   169→            ' IOControl 긍정 응답
   170→            Dim did As String = data(1).ToString("X2") & data(2).ToString("X2")
   171→            Dim ctrl As String = If(data.Length >= 4 AndAlso data(3) = &H3, "동작중", "정지")
   172→            AppendResult($"[RX] IOControl 응답 ← {ecuName} DID={did} {ctrl}")
   173→
   174→        ElseIf data(0) = &H7F AndAlso data.Length >= 3 Then
   175→            ' NRC
   176→            Dim nrcSid As String = data(1).ToString("X2")
   177→            Dim nrcCode As String = data(2).ToString("X2")
   178→            Dim nrcMsg As String = If(data(2) = &H78, "(처리중...대기)", "")
   179→            AppendResult($"[NRC] {ecuName} SID=0x{nrcSid} NRC=0x{nrcCode} {nrcMsg}")
   180→
   181→        ElseIf data(0) = &H54 Then
   182→            ' ClearDTC 긍정 응답
   183→            AppendResult("[ClearDTC] " & ecuName & " OK")
   184→
   185→        ElseIf data(0) = &H50 Then
   186→            ' Session 긍정 응답
   187→            AppendResult("[Session] " & ecuName & " OK")
   188→
   189→        Else
   190→            AppendResult("[UDS] " & ecuName & " → " & hex)
   191→        End If
   192→    End Sub
   193→
   194→    ''' <summary>응답 ID → ECU 이름 매핑</summary>
   195→    Private Shared Function GetEcuName(ByVal respId As UInteger) As String
   196→        Select Case respId
   197→            Case &H739 : Return "PSU_RR(0x739)"
   198→            Case &H7AB : Return "PSU_Drv(0x7AB)"
   199→            Case &H79F : Return "PSU_Ast(0x79F)"
   200→            Case &H759 : Return "DPSS(0x759)"
   201→            Case &H5EE : Return "APSS(0x5EE)"
   202→            Case &H5CE : Return "RLPSS(0x5CE)"
   203→            Case &H5CF : Return "RRPSS(0x5CF)"
   204→            Case &H77B : Return "RARS(0x77B)"
   205→            Case Else : Return "0x" & respId.ToString("X3")
   206→        End Select
   207→    End Function

   354→    ' =========================================================
   355→    '  레스트 모드 (CAN FD 0x3DB, 32byte, 200ms 주기)
   356→    '  PSeat_RLAutoPlayCmd_New: bit 144 (byte[18] bit 0-5)
   357→    '  PSeat_RRAutoPlayCmd_New: bit 150 (byte[18] bit 6 ~ byte[19] bit 3)
   358→    '  Value: 0x00=Off, 0x01=Relax, 0x02=Return
   359→    ' =========================================================
   360→
   361→    ''' <summary>0x3DB 레스트 모드 32byte 데이터 생성</summary>
   362→    Private Function BuildRestData(ByVal rlValue As Byte, ByVal rrValue As Byte) As Byte()
   363→        Dim data(31) As Byte
   364→        ' RL (bit 144-149): byte[18] bits 0-5
   365→        ' RR (bit 150-155): byte[18] bits 6-7 + byte[19] bits 0-3
   366→        data(18) = CByte((rlValue And &H3F) Or ((rrValue And &H3) << 6))
   367→        data(19) = CByte((rrValue >> 2) And &HF)
   368→        Return data
   369→    End Function
   370→
   371→    Private Sub SendRestMode(ByVal jobName As String, ByVal rlVal As Byte, ByVal rrVal As Byte, ByVal logMsg As String)
   372→        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
   373→        AppendLog(logMsg)
   374→        ' 기존 레스트 Job 제거 후 새로 등록
   375→        _can.RemoveJob("REST_MODE")
   376→        Dim d = BuildRestData(rlVal, rrVal)
   377→        _can.AddJob32("REST_MODE", &H3DB, 200,
   378→                      d(0), d(1), d(2), d(3), d(4), d(5), d(6), d(7),
   379→                      d(8), d(9), d(10), d(11), d(12), d(13), d(14), d(15),
   380→                      d(16), d(17), d(18), d(19), d(20), d(21), d(22), d(23),
   381→                      d(24), d(25), d(26), d(27), d(28), d(29), d(30), d(31))
   382→        AppendResult("[REST] " & logMsg & " → byte[18]=0x" & d(18).ToString("X2") & " byte[19]=0x" & d(19).ToString("X2"))
   383→    End Sub
   384→

   485→    Private Sub UpdateVoltToggleButton()

   487→            btnVoltToggle.Text = "ON " & Module1.TargetVolt.ToString("F1") & "V"

input.content:
[Console]::OutputEncoding = [Text.Encoding]::UTF8
Write-Output "START"
Add-Type -Assembly System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
$f = 'C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_gn7\can pe 자료\Microsoft_Word_Document.docx'
Write-Output "File: $f"
Write-Output "Exists: $(Test-Path $f)"
if (Test-Path $f) {
    $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead($f)
    Write-Output "Entries: $($zip.Entries.Count)"
    $entry = $zip.GetEntry('word/document.xml')
    Write-Output "Entry: $entry"
    if ($entry) {
        $sr = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader($entry.Open())
        $raw = $sr.ReadToEnd()
        $sr.Close()
        $xml = [xml]$raw
        $ns = New-Object System.Xml.XmlNamespaceManager($xml.NameTable)
        $ns.AddNamespace('w','http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main')
        $count = 0
        foreach ($p in $xml.SelectNodes('//w:p', $ns)) {
            $t = ($p.SelectNodes('.//w:t', $ns) | ForEach-Object { $_.InnerText }) -join ''
            if ($t.Trim()) {
                Write-Output $t
                $count++
            }
        }
        Write-Output "Paragraphs: $count"
    }
    $zip.Dispose()
}
Write-Output "END"

C1: This service function shall be supported if the controller is reprogrammable
C2: When the server transitions from any other session (including default session) to Programming session, Engine condtion is Engine stop, IGN on. ※ If ECU supports OTA feature, ECU can change session to programming session under IGN off.
※ Secured dataIdentifiers, secured memory areas secured routines require a SecurityAccess service and therefore a non-default diagnostic session
※ ACU controllers can or can not support some diagnotic services at default session regardless of security levels. Details refer to
the diagnostic specification of the controllers.
※ All ECU need to support all diagnostic services at both physical ID and functional ID.
※ “engine stop” means “Engine stop” and “not ready” status (HEV, PHEV, EV only)
※ In the boot software, 10/11/27/3E/31/34/36/37 hex services must be presented and other services are optionally presented.
※ Engine Condition (Engine stop, IGN on) of some diagnostic services can be changed according to the ECU’s specific situation
(Exception handling). Refer to the each ECU diagnostic specification in detail.
- If OTA target ECUs support memory redundancy and differential data patch, Upload/Download Functional Unit(34/35/36/37) and RoutineControl(31) services can be used in the extended session during engine running or IGN off.
- According to OTA specification ECU can change session to programming session under IGN off regardless of C2 restriction.
- RoutineControl(31) services can be used in the extended session during engine running in the production process.
※ OTA target ECUs need to support ECUReset(11) service and CommunicationControl(28) service during IGN off.

DiagnosticSessionControl (10 hex) Service
Diagnostic service that is not prescribed in this document follow to ES95486-02.
SecurityAccess(27 hex) Service 
The purpose of this service is to provide a means to access data and/or diagnostic services, which have restricted access for security, emissions, EOL or safety reasons. The security concept uses a seed and key relationship. Diagnostic services which should use “Security Access” are described by “Diagnostic Serviec List” on ES95486-02.
Request Message
Refer to ES95486-02.
Positive Response Message
Refer to ES95486-02.
Supported Negative Response Codes
Refer to ES95486-02.
Security Algorithm (ASK not Applied)
Client requests the “Seed” to server. Server sends the “Seed” to client. Client sends the key which is calculated using “Security Algorithm” with seed and “Hex Values”. Server responeds that the “Key” was valid and that it will unlock itself. The “Security Algorithm” and “Hex Values” are below.
KEY = Security Algorithm(SEED)
Result 1 = KEY.Byte03 = ~(seed high byte.DataByte#3d)^(Hex Value #1)
Result 2 = KEY.Byte02 = ~(seed.DataByte#4d)^(Hex Value #2)
Result 3 = KEY.Byte01 = ~(seed.DataByte#5d)^(Hex Value #3)
Result 4 = KEY.Byte00 = ~(seed Low byte.DataByte#6d)^(Hex Value #4)
※ Hex Value #1 = 0x83, Hex Value #2 = 0xF7, Hex Value #3 = 0x83, Hex Value #4 = 0xF7
Figure 7: Security Access Message Flow Example - Server is in a 'Locked' State
Security Algorithm (ASK Applied)
ES95486-02(Last version)의 '4.3 Security Access (27h) Service'를 만족해야 한다.

목적 및 범위
본 사양서는 전자아키텍처2.0의 전자바디3.0 이후 버전의 차량에서 히터/통풍 시스템을 구성하는Node (스위치)들에 적용되어야 하는 기본적인 LIN 통신 설계 사양을 정의한다. 본 사양과 도면에 명시된 사양이 상이할 경우, 도면 사양이 본 사양을 우선하며, 전자바디2.0 차종도 관련 부분 간 협의 하에 적용할 수 있다.

- ES90600-00, 린(LIN)통신 설계사양서

message.content:
## 작업 목표
"C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_gn7\can pe 자료\" 폴더의 자료들을 읽고, RPSU(시트 ECU)에서 사용하는 CAN 신호들과 통풍(벤트/블로워) 관련 신호만 추출하여 정리 문서를 작성해야 합니다.

## 참조 자료 폴더
경로: C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_gn7\can pe 자료\

파일 목록:
- 20250522_STD_DB_CAR_R2.0_2024_FD_SAU_DRV_Local_v25.05.01 (1).dbc
- 20250905_STD_DB_CAR_R2.0_2024_FD_B2_25.08.01.dbc
- GN7 PE_시트 작동검사기_제작참고서_R2.0_250917(보안해제).pptx
- Microsoft_Excel_Worksheet.xlsx
- Microsoft_PowerPoint_Presentation.pptx
- Microsoft_Word_Document.docx
- Microsoft_Word_Document1.docx
- Microsoft_Word_Document2.docx
- Microsoft_Word_Document3.docx
- [SHVU2_0]LDF(TYPE2)_v1_00_GN7 PE차종_PROTO_1차_241017.ldf
- oleObject4_embedded.xlsx

## 할 일
1. 모든 파일을 읽어서 내용을 파악합니다.
   - DBC 파일은 텍스트로 읽을 수 있음 (CAN 데이터베이스)
   - LDF 파일도 텍스트로 읽을 수 있음 (LIN 데이터베이스)
   - Excel, Word, PPT는 doc-reader로 읽기
   
2. 특히 다음 CAN ID와 관련된 신호를 집중적으로 찾아야 합니다:
   - 0x49B: 통풍/벤트 관련 (CCU 관련, CAN FD 32byte) — **이게 가장 중요** — 블로워가 5초만 돌고 멈추는 문제가 있어서 정확한 바이트맵, 카운터/CRC 유무 확인 필수
   - 0x731/0x739: RPSU UDS 요청/응답 (진단)
   - 0x3D1: BDC_FD_02 IGN 신호
   - 0x3DB: BDC_FD_12 레스트모드 신호
   - 0x7DF: DTC 클리어 (기능주소)
   - RPSU에서 수신하는 모든 CAN 메시지
   - RPSU에서 송신하는 모든 CAN 메시지
   - 통풍/블로워 제어에 관련된 모든 신호

3. DBC 파일에서 특히 확인할 것:
   - 0x49B 메시지의 시그널 정의 (바이트 위치, 비트 길이, 값 범위, 카운터/CRC 시그널 유무)
   - RPSU 노드가 수신(RX)하는 메시지 목록
   - RPSU 노드가 송신(TX)하는 메시지 목록

4. 결과를 아래 경로에 마크다운 파일로 작성합니다:
   **C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_gn7\NoiseTestPwrFrame(ICE)\ICE_CAN_신호_레퍼런스.md**

5. 문서 구성:
   - 원본 자료 출처 표기
   - RPSU 관련 CAN 메시지 (ID, 이름, DLC, 주기, TX/RX 방향)
   - 각 메시지별 시그널 상세 (바이트 위치, 비트 길이, 값 설명)
   - 통풍/블로워 관련 신호 상세 (0x49B 중심)
   - 카운터/CRC가 있다면 계산 방식
   - 현재 코드에서 사용중인 값과 DBC 사양 비교

6. 그리고 CLAUDE.md에 이 문서를 참조하라는 내용을 추가합니다:
   **C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_gn7\NoiseTestPwrFrame(ICE)\CLAUDE.md** 파일 맨 위에 아래 내용 추가:
   ```
   ## CAN PE 신호 레퍼런스
   - ICE(PE) CAN 신호 정리: [ICE_CAN_신호_레퍼런스.md](ICE_CAN_신호_레퍼런스.md)
   - 원본 자료: `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_gn7\can pe 자료\` (DBC, PPT, Word, Excel)
   ```

한글로 작성. 코드 주석도 한글.

cat > /tmp/parse_dbc.ps1 << 'PSEOF'
param([string]$FilePath, [string]$Pattern)
$bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($FilePath)
$text = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString($bytes)
$idx = $text.IndexOf('VERSION')
if ($idx -lt 0) { Write-Host "VERSION not found"; exit 1 }
$content = $text.Substring($idx)
$lines = $content -split "`r`n"
$i = 0
foreach ($line in $lines) {
    $i++
    if ($line -match $Pattern) {
        Write-Host "${i}: $line"
    }
}
PSEOF
echo "Script created"

  4262→            tmrNmlVent.Stop()
  4263→            _nmlVentSide = ""
  4264→            _can.AddJobOnce("NML_V_STOP_LH", &H4A5, &H0, &H0, &H4, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)

  4285→        If _can Is Nothing OrElse String.IsNullOrEmpty(_nmlVentSide) Then
  4286→            tmrNmlVent.Stop()
  4287→            Return
  4288→        End If
  4289→
  4290→        Select Case _nmlVentStep
  4291→            Case 0
  4292→                ' STOP
  4293→                If _nmlVentSide = "LH" Then
  4294→                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_STOP", &H4A5, &H0, &H0, &H4, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
  4295→                Else
  4296→                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_STOP", &H4A5, &H0, &H0, &H40, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
  4297→                End If
  4298→                _nmlVentStep = 1
  4299→
  4300→            Case 1
  4301→                ' 3E0 초기화
  4302→                _can.AddJobOnce("V_3E0_INIT", &H3E0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
  4303→                _nmlVentStep = 2
  4304→
  4305→            Case 2
  4306→                ' 3E0 활성화
  4307→                _can.AddJobOnce("V_3E0_ACT", &H3E0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H50, &H0, &H0, &H0)
  4308→                _nmlVentStep = 3
  4309→

input.command:
# oleObject4 시트 목록만 다시 확인
powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
try {
    \$zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead('C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_gn7\can pe 자료\oleObject4_embedded.xlsx')
    \$wbEntry = \$zip.GetEntry('xl/workbook.xml')
    \$stream = \$wbEntry.Open()
    \$reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader(\$stream)
    \$wbXml = [xml]\$reader.ReadToEnd()
    \$reader.Close(); \$stream.Close()
    \$ns = New-Object System.Xml.XmlNamespaceManager(\$wbXml.NameTable)
    \$ns.AddNamespace('x', 'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main')
    \$sheets = \$wbXml.SelectNodes('//x:sheet', \$ns)
    foreach (\$s in \$sheets) { Write-Host \$s.name }
    \$zip.Dispose()
} catch { Write-Host \"Error: \$_\" }
" 2>/dev/null

경로: `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_gn7\can pe 자료\`

---

## 네트워크 노드 정보

### SAU DRV 로컬 CAN FD (SAU DBC)
- **노드**: `L_SAU_AST_FD`, `L_SAU_RL_FD`, `GW_SAU_DRV_FD`, `L_SAU_RR_FD`
- 게이트웨이 `GW_SAU_DRV_FD`가 BDC/CCU로부터 메시지를 중계

### B2 전체 CAN FD (B2 DBC)
- **주요 시트 관련 노드**: `GW_PSU_DRV_FD`, `GW_PSU_AST_FD`, `GW_PSU_RL_FD`, `GW_PSU_RR_FD`, `GW_PSU_3RD_FD`
- **SHVU 노드**: `SHVU_FRNT_FD`, `SHVU_REAR_FD`, `SHVU_RL_FD`, `SHVU_RR_FD`, `SHVU_3RD_FD`, `SHVU_CCS_FD`
- **CCU**: `CGW_CCU` (BDC 게이트웨이)

---

## 0x49B (1179) BDC_FD_14_500ms - 통풍/히터 명령 [가장 중요]

### 메시지 기본 정보
| 항목 | 값 |
|------|------|
| CAN ID | 0x49B (1179) |
| 메시지명 | BDC_FD_14_500ms |
| DLC | 32 byte (CAN FD) |
| 주기 | 500ms |
| 송신 노드 | CGW_CCU (B2 DBC) / GW_SAU_DRV_FD (SAU DBC, 게이트웨이 중계) |
| 수신 노드 | GW_PSU_DRV_FD, GW_PSU_AST_FD, GW_PSU_RL_FD, GW_PSU_RR_FD, GW_PSU_3RD_FD, SHVU_*, GW_SAU_DRV_FD 등 |
| 속성 | [PE] Periodic and On Event |

### CRC / 카운터 (Alive Counter)
| 시그널 | 비트위치 | 비트길이 | 설명 |
|--------|----------|----------|------|
| **BDC_FD_Crc14Val** | 0 | 16 bit | CRC-16 값 (Byte0[7:0]+Byte1[7:0]) |
| **BDC_FD_AlvCnt14Val** | 16 | 8 bit | Alive Counter (Byte2[7:0]), 0x00~0xFF 순환 |

**중요**: CRC와 Alive Counter가 존재함. 현재 코드에서 Byte0~1을 0xFF로 고정 전송하고 있는데, 이는 DBC 사양 상 CRC 값 위치임. ECU가 CRC 검증을 수행할 경우 통신 불가 원인이 될 수 있음.

### 통풍/히터 커맨드 시그널 상세 (바이트 순서)

DBC 시그널 비트 위치는 LSB first (Little Endian) 기준.

| 시그널명 | 시작비트 | 길이 | 바이트 | 니블 | 값 범위 | 설명 |
|----------|----------|------|--------|------|---------|------|
| BDC_FD_Crc14Val | 0 | 16 | Byte0-1 | - | 0~0xFFFF | CRC16 체크값 |
| BDC_FD_AlvCnt14Val | 16 | 8 | Byte2 | - | 0~0xFF | 카운터 |
| **SHV_DrvSeatHeatVentCmd** | 24 | 4 | Byte3[3:0] | Lo | 0~15 | **운전석 히트/벤트 커맨드** |
| SHV_DrvSeatHeatVentIndCmd | 28 | 4 | Byte3[7:4] | Hi | 0~15 | 운전석 인디케이터 커맨드 |
| SHV_DrvSeatHeaterBalanceUSMState | 32 | 4 | Byte4[3:0] | Lo | 0~15 | 운전석 히터 밸런스 |
| SHV_DrvSeatHeatVentOSDReq | 36 | 2 | Byte4[5:4] | - | 0~3 | OSD 요청 (B2 DBC만) |
| SHV_AstSeatHeatVentOSDReq | 38 | 2 | Byte4[7:6] | - | 0~3 | OSD 요청 (B2 DBC만) |
| **SHV_AstSeatHeatVentCmd** | 40 | 4 | Byte5[3:0] | Lo | 0~15 | **조수석 히트/벤트 커맨드** |
| SHV_AstSeatHeatVentIndCmd | 44 | 4 | Byte5[7:4] | Hi | 0~15 | 조수석 인디케이터 커맨드 |
| SHV_AstSeatHeaterBalanceUSMState | 48 | 4 | Byte6[3:0] | Lo | 0~15 | 조수석 히터 밸런스 |
| **SHV_RLSeatHeatVentCmd** | 56 | 4 | Byte7[3:0] | Lo | 0~15 | **뒷좌석 좌(RL) 히트/벤트 커맨드** |
| SHV_RLSeatHeatVentIndCmd | 60 | 4 | Byte7[7:4] | Hi | 0~15 | RL 인디케이터 커맨드 |
| SHV_RLSeatHeaterBalanceUSMState | 64 | 4 | Byte8[3:0] | Lo | 0~15 | RL 히터 밸런스 |
| **SHV_RRSeatHeatVentCmd** | 72 | 4 | Byte9[3:0] | Lo | 0~15 | **뒷좌석 우(RR) 히트/벤트 커맨드** |
| SHV_RRSeatHeatVentIndCmd | 76 | 4 | Byte9[7:4] | Hi | 0~15 | RR 인디케이터 커맨드 |
| SHV_RRSeatHeaterBalanceUSMState | 80 | 4 | Byte10[3:0] | Lo | 0~15 | RR 히터 밸런스 |
| **SHV_TLSeatHeatVentCmd** | 88 | 4 | Byte11[3:0] | Lo | 0~15 | 3열 좌(TL) 히트/벤트 커맨드 |
| SHV_TLSeatHeatVentIndCmd | 92 | 4 | Byte11[7:4] | Hi | 0~15 | TL 인디케이터 커맨드 |
| SHV_RLHRHeatUSM | 96 | 2 | Byte12[1:0] | - | 0~3 | RL 헤드레스트 히팅 |
| SHV_RRHRHeatUSM | 98 | 2 | Byte12[3:2] | - | 0~3 | RR 헤드레스트 히팅 |
| **SHV_TRSeatHeatVentCmd** | 104 | 4 | Byte13[3:0] | Lo | 0~15 | 3열 우(TR) 히트/벤트 커맨드 |
| SHV_TRSeatHeatVentIndCmd | 108 | 4 | Byte13[7:4] | Hi | 0~15 | TR 인디케이터 커맨드 |
| **SHV_VehicleSpeedRelatedVentLevel** | 120 | 4 | Byte15[3:0] | Lo | 0~15 | **차속 연동 벤트 레벨** |
| **SHV_Enable** | 124 | 1 | Byte15[4] | - | 0~1 | **히트/벤트 Enable** |
| SASU_RLHeadCtrAirCellCmd | 208 | 2 | Byte26[1:0] | - | 0~3 | RL 목 중앙 에어셀 |
| SASU_RLHeadSdAirCellCmd | 210 | 2 | Byte26[3:2] | - | 0~3 | RL 목 사이드 에어셀 |
| SASU_RRHeadCtrAirCellCmd | 212 | 2 | Byte26[5:4] | - | 0~3 | RR 목 중앙 에어셀 |
| SASU_RRHeadSdAirCellCmd | 214 | 2 | Byte26[7:6] | - | 0~3 | RR 목 사이드 에어셀 |
| SASU_RLMsgPulseUSMState | 216 | 2 | Byte27[1:0] | - | 0~3 | RL 마사지 USM |
| SASU_RLMsgPulseCmd | 218 | 2 | Byte27[3:2] | - | 0~3 | RL 마사지 커맨드 |
| SASU_RLL1~4/RLR1~4BackAirCellCmd | 220~234 | 각2 | Byte27~29 | - | 0~3 | RL 등 에어셀 x8 |
| SASU_RRMsgPulseUSMState | 236 | 2 | Byte29[5:4] | - | 0~3 | RR 마사지 USM |
| SASU_RRMsgPulseCmd | 238 | 2 | Byte29[7:6] | - | 0~3 | RR 마사지 커맨드 |
| SASU_RRL1~4/RRR1~4BackAirCellCmd | 240~254 | 각2 | Byte30~31 | - | 0~3 | RR 등 에어셀 x8 |

### HeatVentCmd 값 정의 (모든 시트 공통)

| 값 | 의미 |
|----|------|
| 0 | Init (초기값) |
| 1 | RESERVED |
| 2 | Heater & Vent OFF |
| 3 | **Vent Low** |
| 4 | **Vent Mid** |
| 5 | **Vent High** |
| 6 | Heater Low |
| 7 | Heater Mid |
| 8 | Heater High |
| 9~14 | RESERVED |
| 15 | Invalid |

### SHV_VehicleSpeedRelatedVentLevel 값 정의

| 값 | 의미 |
|----|------|
| 0 | Off |
| 1 | None |
| 2~13 | Level1~6 (Init/Confirm 쌍) |
| 14 | RESERVED |
| 15 | Invalid |

### SHV_Enable 값 정의

| 값 | 의미 |
|----|------|
| 0 | Off |
| 1 | **On** (히트/벤트 기능 활성화) |

---

## 현재 코드의 0x49B 사용 분석 및 DBC 비교

### 현재 코드 (FrmCanIce.vb + FrmMainRH.vb)

#### RL VENT ON
```
Byte:  FF FF 00 00 00 00 00 05 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 10 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
```
- Byte0-1 (0xFF,0xFF): CRC 위치에 0xFFFF 고정
- Byte2 (0x00): AliveCounter = 0 고정
- Byte7 (0x05): SHV_RLSeatHeatVentCmd = 5 (Vent High), SHV_RLSeatHeatVentIndCmd = 0 (Init)
- Byte15 (0x10): SHV_VehicleSpeedRelatedVentLevel의 비트 120~123 = 0, SHV_Enable 비트124 = 1 (On)
  - 0x10 = 0001_0000 → bit4=1 → SHV_Enable = 1 (On)

#### RR VENT ON
```
Byte:  FF FF 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 05 00 00 00 00 00 10 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
```
- Byte9 (0x05): SHV_RRSeatHeatVentCmd = 5 (Vent High), SHV_RRSeatHeatVentIndCmd = 0 (Init)
- Byte15 (0x10): SHV_Enable = 1 (On)

#### VENT OFF
```
Byte:  FF FF 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
```
- 모든 HeatVentCmd = 0 (Init), SHV_Enable = 0 (Off)

### DBC 사양과의 차이점 및 잠재 문제

1. **CRC (Byte0-1)**: 코드에서 0xFFFF 고정 전송. DBC 상 `BDC_FD_Crc14Val`은 CRC16 체크값.
   - ECU가 CRC 검증을 수행하면 메시지 무시 가능
   - **블로워 5초 후 멈추는 문제의 원인 가능성**: ECU가 처음 몇 프레임은 수락하다가 CRC 불일치 누적으로 커뮤니케이션 에러 판정 후 페일세이프 동작 (벤트 OFF)

2. **AliveCounter (Byte2)**: 코드에서 0x00 고정. DBC 상 `BDC_FD_AlvCnt14Val`은 0~255 순환 필요.
   - ECU가 AliveCounter 검증 시, 카운터 미증가 = 수신 중단 판정
   - **블로워 5초 후 멈추는 문제의 원인 가능성**: Timeout 감지 후 페일세이프

3. **IndCmd 값**: RL/RR 벤트 ON 시 IndCmd = 0 (Init). DBC 상 인디케이터 커맨드도 함께 설정해야 할 수 있음.
   - Vent High ON 시 IndCmd도 5 (Vent High)로 설정 필요 가능성

4. **VehicleSpeedRelatedVentLevel**: 코드에서 0. DBC 상 0 = Off.
   - 차속 연동 기능은 사용 안 하는 것으로 보임 (검사기이므로 OK)

### 권장 수정 방향
- **AliveCounter**: 500ms 주기마다 +1 증가시키는 로직 추가 (0→1→2→...→255→0)
- **CRC**: CRC-16 계산 로직 추가 (또는 CRC 검증 비활성화 여부 확인)
- **IndCmd**: VentCmd와 동일한 값으로 설정 (예: RL Vent High → Byte7 = 0x55)

---

## 0x3D1 (977) BDC_FD_02_200ms - IGN 상태

| 항목 | 값 |
|------|------|
| CAN ID | 0x3D1 (977) |
| 메시지명 | BDC_FD_02_200ms |
| DLC | 32 byte (CAN FD) |
| 주기 | 200ms |
| 송신 | CGW_CCU / GW_SAU_DRV_FD |

### 주요 시그널

| 시그널명 | 시작비트 | 길이 | 바이트 | 값 정의 |
|----------|----------|------|--------|---------|
| BDC_FD_Crc2Val | 0 | 16 | Byte0-1 | CRC16 |
| BDC_FD_AlvCnt2Val | 16 | 8 | Byte2 | AliveCounter |
| BCM_KeyInSta | 24 | 2 | Byte3[1:0] | 키 상태 |
| BCM_AccInSta | 26 | 2 | Byte3[3:2] | ACC 상태 |
| **BCM_Ign1InSta** | 28 | 2 | Byte3[5:4] | **IGN1**: 0=Off, 1=On, 2=Not Used, 3=Error |
| BCM_Ign2InSta | 30 | 2 | Byte3[7:6] | IGN2: 0=Off, 1=On |
| BCM_GearPosPSta | 40 | 2 | Byte5[1:0] | 기어 P 상태 |

### 현재 코드 IGN ON
```
Byte:  FF FF 00 55 00 00 00 00 ...
```
- Byte3 = 0x55 = 0101_0101
  - BCM_KeyInSta[1:0] = 01 (Key In)
  - BCM_AccInSta[3:2] = 01 (ACC On)
  - BCM_Ign1InSta[5:4] = 01 (IGN1 On)
  - BCM_Ign2InSta[7:6] = 01 (IGN2 On)
- CRC(0xFFFF)/AliveCounter(0x00) 고정 — 위와 동일한 문제 있을 수 있음

---

## 0x3DB (987) BDC_FD_12_200ms - 레스트모드/이지액세스

| 항목 | 값 |
|------|------|
| CAN ID | 0x3DB (987) |

| 송신 | CGW_CCU / GW_SAU_DRV_FD |

### 주요 시그널 (시트 관련)

| 시그널명 | 시작비트 | 길이 | 설명 |
|----------|----------|------|------|
| BDC_FD_Crc12Val | 0 | 16 | CRC16 |
| BDC_FD_AlvCnt12Val | 16 | 8 | AliveCounter |
| PSeat_DrvCushionExtManualPlayCmd | 24 | 2 | 운전석 쿠션확장 수동 |
| PSeat_AstCushionExtManualPlayCmd | 26 | 2 | 조수석 쿠션확장 수동 |
| PSeat_RLCushionExtManualPlayCmd | 28 | 2 | RL 쿠션확장 수동 |
| PSeat_RRCushionExtManualPlayCmd | 30 | 2 | RR 쿠션확장 수동 |
| PSeat_DrvLegrestManualPlayCmd | 32 | 2 | 운전석 레그레스트 |
| PSeat_RLLegrestManualPlayCmd | 36 | 2 | RL 레그레스트 |
| PSeat_RRLegrestManualPlayCmd | 38 | 2 | RR 레그레스트 |
| RLPSM_RearModeState | 81 | 3 | RL 리어모드 상태 |
| RRPSM_RearModeState | 84 | 4 | RR 리어모드 상태 |
| PSeat_DrvEasyAccessPlayReq | 94 | 3 | 운전석 이지액세스 |
| PSeat_DrvAutoPlayCmd_New | 132 | 6 | 운전석 자동재생 |
| PSeat_RLAutoPlayCmd_New | 144 | 6 | RL 자동재생 |

## 0x49B 바이트맵 시각화

```
0x49B BDC_FD_14_500ms (32 bytes, 500ms 주기)

Byte  Hex   비트[7:4]              비트[3:0]
----  ----  ---------------------  ---------------------
 0    0xXX  CRC14 Low[7:4]         CRC14 Low[3:0]
 1    0xXX  CRC14 High[7:4]        CRC14 High[3:0]
 2    0xXX  AlvCnt14[7:4]          AlvCnt14[3:0]
 3    0xXX  DrvHeatVentIndCmd      DrvHeatVentCmd          ← 운전석
 4    0xXX  (OSD 관련)             DrvHeaterBalanceUSM
 5    0xXX  AstHeatVentIndCmd      AstHeatVentCmd          ← 조수석
 6    0xXX  (예약)                 AstHeaterBalanceUSM
 7    0xXX  RLHeatVentIndCmd       RLHeatVentCmd           ← 뒷좌 좌(RL)
 8    0xXX  (예약)                 RLHeaterBalanceUSM
 9    0xXX  RRHeatVentIndCmd       RRHeatVentCmd           ← 뒷좌 우(RR)
10    0xXX  (예약)                 RRHeaterBalanceUSM
11    0xXX  TLHeatVentIndCmd       TLHeatVentCmd           ← 3열 좌(TL)
12    0xXX  (예약)                 RLHRHeat|RRHRHeat
13    0xXX  TRHeatVentIndCmd       TRHeatVentCmd           ← 3열 우(TR)
14    0xXX  (예약)                 (예약)
15    0xXX  (예약)|Enable          VehicleSpeedVentLevel   ← Enable bit4!
16-25 0x00  (예약)
26    0xXX  RR목에어셀             RL목에어셀              ← SASU 에어셀
27    0xXX  RL마사지/에어셀        RL마사지USM/에어셀
28-29 0xXX  RL/RR 등 에어셀
30-31 0xXX  RR 등 에어셀
```

### 현재 코드에서 전송하는 값 매핑

**RL VENT ON**: `FF FF 00 00 00 00 00 05 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 10 ...`
```
Byte7  = 0x05 → RLHeatVentCmd=5(Vent High), RLHeatVentIndCmd=0(Init)
Byte15 = 0x10 → VehicleSpeedVentLevel=0(Off), Enable=1(On)
나머지 = 0x00
```

**RR VENT ON**: `FF FF 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 05 00 00 00 00 00 10 ...`
```
Byte9  = 0x05 → RRHeatVentCmd=5(Vent High), RRHeatVentIndCmd=0(Init)
Byte15 = 0x10 → Enable=1(On)
나머지 = 0x00
```

---

## 블로워 5초 정지 문제 분석

### 가능한 원인 (우선순위 순)

1. **AliveCounter 미증가** (가장 유력)
   - 코드: Byte2 = 0x00 고정
   - DBC: 0x00~0xFF 순환 필요 (500ms마다 +1)
   - ECU는 보통 3~5프레임 내 AliveCounter 에러 감지 → 페일세이프
   - 500ms x 5프레임 = 2.5초, 추가 debounce 시간 포함 시 약 5초

2. **CRC 불일치**
   - 코드: Byte0-1 = 0xFFFF 고정
   - DBC: CRC-16 계산값 필요
   - CRC 에러 누적 → 커뮤니케이션 에러 → 벤트 OFF

3. **IndCmd 미설정**
   - Cmd와 IndCmd 불일치 시 ECU 내부 로직에서 비정상 판단 가능

### 수정 제안

```vb
' AliveCounter 증가 구현 예시
Private _alvCnt49B As Byte = 0

Private Sub Send49B_RlVentOn()
    _alvCnt49B = CByte((_alvCnt49B + 1) And &HFF)
    ' CRC는 별도 계산 필요 (또는 검증 비활성 확인 후 0xFFFF)
    _can.AddJob32("RL_VENT_ON", &H49B, 500,
        &HFF, &HFF, _alvCnt49B, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H55,  ' Byte7: Cmd=5, IndCmd=5
        &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H10,
        &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
        &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
End Sub
```

참고: AddJob32는 동일 데이터를 반복 전송하므로, AliveCounter를 증가시키려면 Timer에서 매번 데이터를 갱신하는 방식으로 변경해야 함.

---

## 커넥터 핀 참고 (Excel)

Microsoft_Excel_Worksheet.xlsx에서 VENT_BLOWER_GND_DRV 핀이 FRT LH(15번), FRT RH(29번)에 존재.
RR RH 커넥터에는 RPSU/RARS 관련 B+, GND, LIN 핀이 배치.

---

content.text:
작업 완료. 결과를 요약합니다.

---

## 완료 내역

### 1. 생성된 파일
- `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_gn7\NoiseTestPwrFrame(ICE)\ICE_CAN_신호_레퍼런스.md`

### 2. 수정된 파일
- `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_gn7\NoiseTestPwrFrame(ICE)\CLAUDE.md` (맨 위에 레퍼런스 링크 추가)

### 3. 핵심 발견 사항

**0x49B (BDC_FD_14_500ms) 메시지 분석 결과:**
- DLC 32byte, 500ms 주기, CAN FD
- **CRC-16 (Byte0-1)** + **AliveCounter (Byte2)** 가 존재함
- 현재 코드: CRC=0xFFFF 고정, AliveCounter=0x00 고정 전송

**블로워 5초 정지 문제의 가장 유력한 원인:**
- **AliveCounter가 증가하지 않음** (Byte2 = 0x00 고정)
- ECU는 보통 3~5프레임 내 AliveCounter 에러 감지 후 페일세이프 발동
- 500ms x 5프레임 = 2.5초 + debounce = 약 5초 (관찰된 증상과 일치)

**추가 문제:**
- CRC도 고정값이므로 CRC 검증 시 에러
- IndCmd(인디케이터 커맨드)가 0(Init)으로 전송되어 Cmd와 불일치

**수정 방향:**
- AddJob32는 고정 데이터 반복 전송이므로, Timer 기반으로 매 주기마다 AliveCounter를 +1하면서 데이터를 갱신하는 방식으로 변경 필요
- CRC 계산 로직 추가 (또는 ECU의 CRC 검증 여부 확인)
- IndCmd도 VentCmd와 동일한 값(5)으로 설정
